demo.title: to3d.sh
demo.code:
# Dry-run first — needs no key, prints the exact Replicate request
node to3d.mjs --image in/prop.png --dry-run

# Image -> 3D model (GLB) — bring your own Replicate key
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN=r8_xxx node to3d.mjs \
  --image in/prop.png --out out/prop.glb

# Use a different 3D model (e.g. hunyuan, single-image input)
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN=r8_xxx node to3d.mjs \
  --image in/prop.png --model <owner/model> --image-mode single --output-key mesh --out out/prop.glb

setup: Node 18+ — uses built-in fetch, zero dependencies (no npm install)
Bring your own Replicate API token: export REPLICATE_API_TOKEN (get one at https://replicate.com/account/api-tokens). Generation is billed to your Replicate account, not MythosForge.
Default model firtoz/trellis (array input); for an unmapped --model pass --image-mode and --output-key. Verify with `--dry-run` (needs no key) first.
